case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS NEUBERT, LYNWOOD

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,064.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT NEUBERT, LYNWOOD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-18-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NEUBERT, LYNWOOD
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-18-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-17-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 IF NO APPEARANCES, CONTINUE FOR ANOTHER 6 MONTHS; TOTAL OF 21 MONTHLY PAYMENTS.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEUBERT, LYNWOOD $1,099.00 PRINCIPAL, $35.87 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,134.87, DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
